narration: Your brain literally cannot estimate compound interest correctly — scientists tested it. Most people are off by sixty-five percent. That blind spot is quietly stealing your wealth.
visual: Dark background, animated graph showing exponential green curve vs dashed gray straight line diverging over 30 years, 'YOUR BRAIN VS REALITY' title springs in from bottom

narration: Researchers asked what $100 grows to at ten percent for thirty years. Average guess was six hundred. The real answer is $1,744 — your brain undershoots by almost two-thirds.
visual: Light background, $100 bill SVG scales in from center, then two bars animate up side by side: gray bar '$600 YOUR GUESS' and tall green bar '$1,744 REALITY', '65% OFF' label appears

narration: That brain glitch has a real price. Five thousand dollars at twenty-five becomes $74,000 at retirement. The same money at thirty-five? Only $37,000. Ten years costs you half your wealth.
visual: Dark background, two piggy banks: large green piggy labeled 'START AT 25 → $74,000' slides in from left, small gray piggy labeled 'START AT 35 → $37,000' slides in from right

narration: Here's why. You're hardwired for linear thinking — your brain draws a straight line where money curves. Stores exploit this every day, showing monthly costs and hiding the thirty-year total.
visual: Light background, brain SVG scales in, red X over it, side-by-side comparison boxes: 'YOUR BRAIN: straight line graph' vs 'MONEY: exponential curve', '$14.99/month = $5,400 by 2056' highlight

narration: There's a fix. Stop thinking about monthly contributions and picture the final number instead. Studies show just visualizing your future balance boosts savings rates by nineteen percent.
visual: Dark background, calculator phone SVG slides up, counter animates from $0 to $1,100,000 on screen, '$300/MONTH × 1,000 ≈ 30-YEAR BALANCE AT 7%' formula below, green glow around the number

narration: Override your brain right now. Grab your calculator, multiply your monthly savings by one thousand. That rough number is your future. Start building it today — your future self is counting on it.
visual: Light background, calendar SVG with today circled in green, three steps animate in with numbered circles: 1 Open calculator 2 Monthly savings × 1,000 3 Start today, green CTA badge pulses at bottom
